title: fragaria virginiana f. multicipita
intro: Fragaria virginiana f. multicipita, also known as the woodland strawberry or multiple fruit strawberry, is a rare and unique variety of strawberry native to North America. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating a range of health issues. The health benefits of Fragaria virginiana f. multicipita include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic and antimicrobial agent. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal medicine to support digestive health and reduce symptoms of menopause.
